entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to the sorghum midge

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: The pest Contarinia sorghicola that infests sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum cultivars to resist infestation by the sorghum midge

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The degree to which sorghum cultivars are affected by the sorghum midge

entities.name: GRAIN DAMAGE
entities.description: Damage caused to the panicles of sorghum by the sorghum midge

entities.name: GLUME SIZE
entities.description: The length of the glume in sorghum floral parts

entities.name: LEMMA SIZE
entities.description: The length of the lemma in sorghum floral parts

entities.name: PALEA SIZE
entities.description: The length of the palea in sorghum floral parts

entities.name: LODICULE SIZE
entities.description: The length of the lodicule in sorghum floral parts

entities.name: STIGMA SIZE
entities.description: The length of the stigma in sorghum floral parts

entities.name: STYLE SIZE
entities.description: The length of the style in sorghum floral parts

entities.name: ANTHER SIZE
entities.description: The length of the anther in sorghum floral parts

entities.name: RATE OF GRAIN DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The speed of grain development between the 3rd and 7th day after anthesis

entities.name: TANNIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of tannin present in the sorghum grain

entities.name: NO-CHOICE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Experimental conditions where the pest has no alternative host
